project_image_processing.logic_desc.skip: Images are not processed and are not copied to the results folder
project_image_processing.logic_desc.ocr_: OCR models are tuned to find text in images and usually give the highest accuracy. Best when you work with many document scans
project_image_processing.logic_desc.visi: Vision (multimodal) models are versatile for text recognition but may misread some parts
project_image_processing.yandex_key_bann: Yandex OCR is unavailable: the yandex API key is not set
project_image_processing.ocr.intro: Choose the OCR provider and model. For now selection is limited to Yandex services
project_image_processing.ocr.hint_model: Model to use; keeping «page» is recommended
project_image_processing.vision.intro: Configure available models from the main screen via «Model settings». Only models with image input support are listed here
project_image_processing.vision_model.re: If the model supports reasoning, enabling it can improve text recognition but increases API cost
project_image_processing.vision_model.te: Creativity (0.0 = none, 2.0 = max). 0.3 is a good default to fix minor OCR errors. Not all models support this parameter; if an error occurs, set the value to 1.0.
project_image_processing.vision_model.ex: Additional system-prompt instructions for image text recognition; optional
project_image_processing.article:
The «Image processing» section configures how text is recognized in images.

Available modes and models depend on API keys (openai, claude, etc.). Add keys from the main screen via «Settings».

Modes:
- Skip — images are not processed or saved.
- Yandex OCR — OCR-focused models; requires a configured Yandex API key.
- Vision LLM — multimodal models that can «see» images; requires a provider API key.

*Configure vision models from «Model settings» on the main screen: enable the model and check «Image input».
